title: Marketing Analyst (Marketing Analytics, Bangkok Based, Relocation provided)
required_skills: Bachelor's Degree in quantitative subject (CS, mathematics, economics, engineering, statistics)
Data analysis tools: SAS / R / SPSS / Python / VBA / SQL / Tableau
bonus_skills: R Studio / data modeling / hypothesis testing
matched_skills: Digital marketing experience (IoT, e-commerce, ATM manufacturing campaigns)
A/B & multivariate testing (maps to hypothesis testing)
Dashboard / data modeling (Power BI PL-300, Looker Studio, Qlik Sense)
missing_skills: R / R Studio (not listed in tools)
Search engine marketing hands-on (Google Ads, Bing, Baidu, Naver bidding)
Paid social campaign management (Facebook Ads, Twitter Ads)
Degree in strictly quantitative field (CS, mathematics, statistics, engineering)
core_responsibilities: Experiment with text ads, bidding strategies, and campaign structures across search engines (Google, Bing, Baidu, Naver)
Test, analyze, and optimize display campaigns on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram
Analyze large-scale experiment data and develop optimization models
Roll out changes from successful A/B tests across marketing programs
recommended_emphasis: Lead with Python and SQL experience — these are the two matched required tools; mention specific use cases (data modeling, funnel analysis)
Highlight A/B testing and experiment design work — directly maps to JD's core experimentation focus
Emphasize dashboard-building experience (Power BI, Looker Studio) for the 'build dashboards for account managers' responsibility
Showcase e-commerce and campaign ROI analytics experience (Moli Media, Intelligent Power) as proxy for performance marketing analytics
Frame multi-market campaign analytics (EMEA, APAC) to signal readiness for Agoda's global scale
Mention any exposure to paid search or social channels, even if indirect (campaign performance tracking, bid/spend analysis)
